About Me

A Mind Driven
by Purpose

Finance · Economics · Data Analytics

Aspiring Financial Analyst with a strong foundation in Finance, Economics, and Data Analytics, driven by one clear goal: transforming data into meaningful, actionable decisions. Beyond the numbers, I bring clarity to complexity as an Article Writer, simplifying intricate financial and economic concepts into engaging narratives. Outside academics, I serve as a Euphonist in my Institute's Brass Band — an experience that has instilled discipline, precision, and the ability to perform under pressure.
